dcdc_turnon.title: DC-DC Turn On Time
dcdc_turnon.short: Time when the high-voltage DC-DC converter is turned on, referenced to the end of the previous acquisition.
dcdc_turnon.recommended: Values below 19500 us are considered safe; tune mainly for energy optimization.
dcdc_turnon.details: Controlled by the low-frequency crystal clock domain (LFXT).
dcdc_turnon.notes: In most setups this does not need frequent retuning once stable behavior is reached.

meas_period.title: Acquisition Period
meas_period.details: Higher frame rates can become less stable due to BLE bandwidth limits.

sampling_freq.title: Sampling Frequency
sampling_freq.short: ADC sampling frequency used during ultrasound acquisition.
sampling_freq.recommended: 8 MHz is the recommended default for WULPUS.
sampling_freq.details: This value affects depth sampling resolution and depth range together with the number of samples.

num_samples.title: Number of Samples
num_samples.short: Number of ADC samples acquired per ultrasound frame.
num_samples.details: Depth in tissue can be approximated from speed of sound c, number of samples N, and sampling frequency fs.
num_samples.notes: With c ~= 1540 m/s, N = 400, fs = 8 MHz, depth is approximately 38.5 mm.

rx_gain.title: Receive (RX) Gain
rx_gain.short: Gain of the programmable gain amplifier (PGA) in the receive path.
rx_gain.details: A higher gain increases sensitivity but may increase noise and saturation risk.

pulse_freq.title: Pulse Frequency
pulse_freq.recommended: Typically set near transducer center frequency; often 1.5-2.5 MHz.
pulse_freq.details: Best performance usually occurs when transmit frequency matches transducer resonance.

trans_freq.title: Transducer Frequency
trans_freq.details: Keep this aligned with pulse frequency for consistent excitation behavior.

num_pulses.title: Number of Pulses
num_pulses.short: Number of excitation pulses emitted per acquisition.
num_pulses.recommended: Use the minimum that yields robust SNR for your probe.
num_pulses.details: Increasing pulse count can improve excitation energy but may also affect timing and power.

start_hvmuxrx.title: HV-MUX RX Start Time
start_hvmuxrx.short: Time when the high-voltage multiplexer switches from TX to RX path.
start_hvmuxrx.details: Controlled by SMCLK. Alignment relative to HSPLL is not perfect and can be device-dependent.
start_hvmuxrx.notes: Treat absolute value as empirical tuning parameter per probe and setup.

start_ppg.title: PPG Start Time
start_ppg.short: Time when ultrasound pulses are generated.
start_ppg.details: Controlled by HSPLL and used as transmit timing reference.

turnon_adc.title: ADC Turn On Time
turnon_adc.short: Time when ADC power-up starts (sampling has not started yet).
turnon_adc.recommended: Keep at 5 us unless specifically required.

start_pgainbias.title: PGA Bias Start Time
start_pgainbias.short: Time when internal PGA bias is enabled.
start_pgainbias.recommended: Keep at 5 us unless specifically required.

start_adcsampl.title: ADC Sampling Start Time
start_adcsampl.short: Time when ADC begins sampling reflected ultrasound signal.
start_adcsampl.details: Delaying this value shifts the acquisition window deeper in tissue.
start_adcsampl.notes: If equal to PPG start time, initial samples are often unusable due to TX/RX switching latency.

restart_capt.title: Capture Restart Time
restart_capt.short: Currently not used in the active firmware path.

capt_timeout.title: Capture Timeout Time
capt_timeout.short: Currently not used in the active firmware path.

tx_rx_configs.title: TX/RX Configurations
tx_rx_configs.short: Defines active transmit and receive channel combinations.
tx_rx_configs.details: Each row is one acquisition configuration; the firmware cycles through configurations round-robin.
tx_rx_configs.notes: Optimized switching can reduce switching artifacts depending on channel overlap.
